roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:74 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  19  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 57 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILLBE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 25, 2014,  THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 57 DAYSOF TREATMENT,/X:DA'S MOTION TO DISMISS COUNT 2, ABSCONDING, IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO 1385PC, UNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 01-17-14/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
